# NSExtensionActivationSupportsWebPageWithMaxCount

**Property List Key**

The maximum number of webpages that the app extension supports.

## Web Content

- **NSExtensionActivationSupportsWebURLWithMaxCount**: The maximum number of HTTP URLs that the app extension supports.

items.description: The maximum number of HTTP URLs that the app extension supports.
